subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye be blessed with His special divine favors and partake of the wine of oneness which floweth from the finger of His Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایات مخصوصه الهیه فائز باشید و از رحیق احدیه که باصبع اراده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
